notes: u_sem_nm is provisionally anchored to EXP-SE-017 (0.1 um 3sigma SEM-vs-line-scale difference -> 100 nm).
u_ellip_nm is anchored to EXP-SE-013 (0.5 nm expanded uncertainty, k=2).
Set pairedRunPresent=true only when matched SEM+ellips sample IDs are commit-tracked.
Set covarianceAnchorPresent=true only when numeric rho or covariance term is present.
